name: 250 MG Paclitaxel Injection IP
about: 250 MG Paclitaxel Injection IP is a medication used to treat various types of cancer, including breast cancer, ovarian cancer, and lung cancer. Sourced from India, this injection is a liquid form of the drug and has a dosage of 250mg, to be administered as per the doctors suggestion. The active ingredient, paclitaxel, works by stopping the growth and spread of cancer cells in the body. This injection is suitable for patients who are unable to take oral medication, and it is essential to store it in a cool place to maintain its efficacy. As an exporter, supplier, and trader, we ensure that our products adhere to the highest quality standards and are delivered promptly.
